channel.title: Theming on Greycloak

item.title: Upgrading this site to the latest Hugo
item.description:
I upgraded Hugo and found that this site (which was set up years ago) no longer built cleanly. Below are the exact changes I made to get it running on the current Hugo without changing the look and feel.

TL;DR

  • Replaced the deprecated resources.ToCSS with css.Sass in the theme.
  • Switched .Site.IsMultiLingual to hugo.IsMultilingual.
  • Updated Disqus access to site.Config.Services.Disqus.Shortname and made comments gracefully disable when unset.
  • No content changes needed; hugo server now runs cleanly.

My environment

  • Hugo: current release as of today
  • Theme: hugo-clarity (as a submodule)

Errors I hit

After upgrading, hugo server complained about three things:
